response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the English sections of the Reference JSON. 2. The Reference JSON is partial (missing the Japanese verses and the latter half of the song); I have manually transcribed the missing sections using audio and on-screen text. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration, adhering to the 'Audio Dictates When' rule. 4. Split mid-sentence pauses (e.g., 01:48) into discrete blocks to maintain precise synchronization.

subtitles.original: はい！プレゼント！
subtitles.english: Here! A present!

subtitles.original: これ……あたし？
subtitles.english: Is this... me?

subtitles.original: うん、「ステージ衣装を着た、キミの絵！So cute……」
subtitles.english: Yeah, 'A drawing of you in a stage outfit! So cute...'

subtitles.original: ちょ、ちょっとあたしには可愛すぎない？
subtitles.english: Hey, isn't it a bit too cute for me?

subtitles.original: そんなことないよー！すっごくぴったり！
subtitles.english: That's not true! It fits you perfectly!

subtitles.original: そ、そうかな……？
subtitles.english: I-is that so...?

subtitles.original: きみはこの「ステージ衣装」を着て……
subtitles.english: You'll wear this stage outfit and...

subtitles.original: Let's sing with me!!
subtitles.english: Let's sing with me!!

subtitles.original: YEAH~
subtitles.english: YEAH~

subtitles.original: The knacks of surviving in this world
subtitles.english: The knacks of surviving in this world

subtitles.original: are being human and being right
subtitles.english: are being human and being right

subtitles.original: Everyone keeps telling me to grow up fast
subtitles.english: Everyone keeps telling me to grow up fast

subtitles.english: And it is so tough, can't wrap my head around it

subtitles.english: Ego trip into a loop
